reconciliation.P3: Present (Black Pot with White Rabbit anchor)

vision_report.inventory_reconciliation: The registry identifies P2 and P4 as occupants of the black pots, but visual evidence confirms these pots are currently devoid of viable botanical specimens, containing only soil and debris.

plant_audit.P1: String of Nickels: Appears dormant or empty; soil surface is dark and undisturbed.
plant_audit.P2: Mexican Mint: Absent. Pot contains only soil and eggshell fragments.
plant_audit.P3: Pothos: Single leaf remains, showing signs of chlorosis and turgor loss. White rabbit anchor is present.
plant_audit.P4: Silver Guest: Absent. Pot contains only soil and eggshell fragments.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Consistently dark and damp across all pots; no signs of fungal bloom or crusting.
biome_observations.biome_anomalies: Presence of crushed eggshells in the black pots (P2/P4) suggests an unrecorded soil amendment intervention.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t-5: Initial state shows P3 with a single leaf and P2/P4 containing eggshell debris.
temporal_deltas.t-5_to_current: Progressive decline in P3's leaf turgor. No new growth or recovery observed in any pot. The environment remains static.

visual_health_inference.P3: Critical/Declining (Leaf turgor loss indicates severe stress).

anomalies: Crushed eggshell fragments in black pots (P2/P4).
Persistent lack of foliage in P1, P2, and P4.
vision_report.narrative_description: The biome is in a state of severe decline. P3 is the only pot retaining a single, struggling leaf, while P2 and P4 have suffered total systemic loss of their registered occupants. The presence of eggshells indicates an attempt at soil enrichment, but this has not resulted in any visible vegetative recovery. The environment is stable but biologically stagnant.
